creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
> Try adding the following to /boot/device.hints and rebooting:
 > 
 > hint.hdac.0.config="gpio0,gpio1,gpio2,gpio3,gpio4,gpio5,gpio6,gpio7"
 > hint.hdac.0.cad0.nid17.config="as=1 seq=15 device=Headphones"
 > hint.hdac.0.cad0.nid18.config="as=1 seq=0 device=Speaker"
 > hint.hdac.0.cad0.nid20.config="as=2 seq=15 device=Line-in"
 > hint.hdac.0.cad0.nid22.config="as=1 seq=15 device=CD"
 > hint.hdac.0.cad0.nid23.config="as=2 seq=0 device=Mic"
 > 
 > Works for me on my Lenovo X300.
 > 
 > -Brandon
 
 Yes, it works as You say, thank You ... but shouldnt
 it work out of the box without these 'hacks'?
 
 Regards,
 vermaden
